title: Governance Audit Artifact
description: Advisory contract formalizing the EXISTING GovernanceAudit shape emitted by src/governance/audit-artifact.ts (Phase 5 writeGovernanceAudit). This schema documents what ships — it does NOT invent a new shape. Drift here breaks byte-identical audit regeneration. x-binding: advisory — the artifact RECORDS governance (evidence), not enforcement; enforcement lives in gate-request/gate-result. This is the ENF-04 boundary made explicit.

schema_version.description: Audit schema version. Matches GovernanceAudit.schema_version literal type.

selection_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 strict timestamp (TD-01 shape). Maps from GovernanceRecord.timestamp.

generated_from.description: Literal type from GovernanceAudit.generated_from — the persisted selection state path.

skippedRule.description: Mirrors AuditSkippedRule (src/governance/audit-artifact.ts lines 30-38). reason is the AUDIT_SKIP_REASONS public enum (line 7); selector_reason is the raw SkipReason enum persisted from selection (types.ts).

reason.description: AUDIT_SKIP_REASONS public enum from audit-artifact.ts. 'explicitly-waived' is the reconcile-only value NOT present in the raw SkipReason enum.

selector_reason.description: Raw SkipReason enum from src/types.ts — selector provenance, persisted verbatim.
